fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) FileTree supports generic sorting with header; ticket-viewer sorts by last-modified/created/title. 2) WgpuOverlay+effects extracted to viewer-api; ticket-viewer renders dependency graph with GPU pipeline. 3) Theme/effects system shared; ticket-viewer has theme presets and effect controls.
fields.title: Composite: Ticket-Viewer Feature Bundle (sorting, 3D graph, themes)
